agents_slug_idx.name: agents_slug_idx
agents_slug_idx.where: "agents"."slug" IS NOT NULL AND "agents"."deleted_at" IS NULL

files_storage_payload_chk.name: files_storage_payload_chk
files_storage_payload_chk.value:
(
        ("files"."storage_provider" =  'db' AND "files"."data" IS NOT NULL AND "files"."object_key" IS NULL)
        OR ("files"."storage_provider" <> 'db' AND "files"."object_key" IS NOT NULL AND "files"."data" IS NULL)
      )

skill_sandbox_replay_events_one_payload_.name: skill_sandbox_replay_events_one_payload_chk
skill_sandbox_replay_events_one_payload_.value:
(
        ("skill_sandbox_replay_events"."command_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("skill_sandbox_replay_events"."file_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("skill_sandbox_replay_events"."skill_mount_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
      ) = 1

tools_archestra_catalog_name_uidx.name: tools_archestra_catalog_name_uidx
tools_archestra_catalog_name_uidx.where: "tools"."catalog_id" = '00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000001' and "tools"."agent_id" is null and "tools"."delegate_to_agent_id" is null
